body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no" ?>
<SnowReport>
	<_LastUpdated>2026-07-16T06:41:57</_LastUpdated>
	<TwentyFourHourSnowfall>0</TwentyFourHourSnowfall>
	<CurrentSnowdepth>43</CurrentSnowdepth>
	<AvSnowdepthinSnowmakingAreas>107</AvSnowdepthinSnowmakingAreas>
	<AvSnowdepthLastMeasuredOn>15/07/2026</AvSnowdepthLastMeasuredOn>
	<DateofLastSnowfall>14/07/2026</DateofLastSnowfall>
	<SevenDaySnowfall>26</SevenDaySnowfall>
	<SeasonToDateSnowfall>95</SeasonToDateSnowfall>
	<Snowmaking>On Standby</Snowmaking>
	<WeatherConditionsasat6AM></WeatherConditionsasat6AM>
	<Temperature>1.4</Temperature>
	<OvernightMin>1.3</OvernightMin>
	<ForecastMax>7</ForecastMax>
	<Wind>Moderate 26-40 km/h</Wind>
	<WindDirection>SSE</WindDirection>
	<Precipitation>None</Precipitation>
	<ExpectedVisibility>Excellent</ExpectedVisibility>
	<ExpectedCloudCover>Mostly Sunny</ExpectedCloudCover>
	<Forecast>Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.</Forecast>
	<ResortReportHeadline>More fun under the Sun!</ResortReportHeadline>
	<ResortReport><p>If you prefer the suns rays I think you'll enjoy the foreseeable future. I can see stars everywhere, there's an alpenglow developing out to the east and we have another bright sunny day on the way.</p><p>The current temp is +1.5 and could climb to as high as +7 degrees later on. In the Village right now there's a moderate wind out of the SSE.</p><p>Same lifts will be on the spin today with the Summit Quad loading from 7:30am for the early birds. The open groomed terrain will definitely be the best bet. Even though the temps didn't get super low last night the surface will start out firm with sunny aspects softening as the day warms.</p><p>Slap on the sunscreen and enjoy! Cheers, Burner.</p></ResortReport>
	<HideReportEDMWeb>False</HideReportEDMWeb>
	<LiftsOpen></LiftsOpen>
	<LiftsStandby></LiftsStandby>
	<LiftsClosed></LiftsClosed>
	<RunsOpen></RunsOpen>
	<RunsGroomed></RunsGroomed>
	<RunsSnowmaking>5</RunsSnowmaking>
	<TerrainParks></TerrainParks>
	<Backcountry>It's a bad day for the backcountry.  The visibility is poor, the weather is wet and the cover is thin and punchy.  Leave it for another day but take care if you must head out there. </Backcountry>
	<Avalanche></Avalanche>
	<HeliLink>Closed</HeliLink>
</SnowReport>
